\part $\overrightarrow{AC} = 2\overrightarrow{AB}$

Find the coordinates of the point $C$.
\AnswerLine[$($ \hspace{1cm} $,$ \hspace{1cm} $)$][]
\Marks{2}

\part The length of $AB$ is $k\sqrt{5}$.

Find the value of $k$.
\AnswerLine[$k = $][]
\Marks{2}

\part $P$ is a point on $AB$.

$AP : PB = 1 : 3$

Find the position vector of $P$.
\AnswerLine[$\displaystyle\binom{\hspace{1cm}}{\hspace{1cm}}$][]
\Marks{2}

\end{parts}

tex:
(a) 
100 students solve a puzzle.
\newline

The table shows information about the time taken by each student to solve the puzzle.
\newline

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
Time ($t$ seconds) & $20 < t \leqslant 40$ & $40 < t \leqslant 60$ & $60 < t \leqslant 100$ \\
\hline
Frequency & 30 & 40 & 30 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
(i)  Work out an estimate of the mean.
\newline

 Complete the histogram to show the information in the table.
\newline

80 adults solve the same puzzle as the students.
\newline

The cumulative frequency table shows information about the time taken by each adult to solve the puzzle.
\newline

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
Time ($t$ seconds) & $t \leqslant 20$ & $t \leqslant 40$ & $t \leqslant 60$ & $t \leqslant 80$ & $t \leqslant 100$ & $t \leqslant 120$ \\
\hline
Cumulative frequency & 0 & 12 & 36 & 60 & 74 & 80 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
(i)  On the grid, draw a cumulative frequency diagram.
\newline

 Use your cumulative frequency diagram to find an estimate for

(b) the median

(c) the lower quartile.
\newline
